user.title: Create briefing profile
user.description: Set up the identity and presentation defaults for one user's briefing.

data_description.display_name: Human-friendly name used in the UI and generated content.
data_description.user_key: Stable internal key used for this user's profile.
data_description.locale: Default locale for provider text and formatting.

identity.name: Identity
identity.description: Who this briefing profile belongs to.

defaults.title: Set defaults
defaults.description: Choose dashboard and output defaults for this briefing profile.

data_description.dashboard_template: Template used when assembling dashboard fragments for this user.
data_description.dashboard_path: Optional preferred dashboard path for deep links and future delivery targets.
data_description.default_delivery_mode: Primary output mode for this user's briefing.
data_description.rendering_style: Tone and formatting preset used by the renderer.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure profile
reconfigure.description: Update stable setup information for this briefing profile.

abort.already_configured: A briefing profile with this user key already exists.

init.title: Profile options
init.description: Adjust mutable behavior for this briefing profile.

data_description.dashboard_template: Dashboard template used to assemble provider fragments.
data_description.dashboard_path: Preferred dashboard path for generated deep links.
data_description.default_delivery_mode: Default output destination for this user.
data_description.user_key: Shown for reference; stable profile identity is not edited here.

generate.name: Generate briefing
generate.description: Generate a briefing for the selected profile and update entity state.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: The profile config entry to generate a briefing for.

preview.name: Preview briefing
preview.description: Generate a preview and return rendered output without updating entity state.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: The profile config entry to preview.

deliver.name: Deliver briefing
deliver.description: Trigger the future delivery interface for a selected profile.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: The profile config entry to deliver from.

refresh_snippet.name: Refresh snippet
refresh_snippet.description: Regenerate a single configured snippet instance.

subentry_id.name: Subentry ID
subentry_id.description: The configured snippet subentry to refresh.

user.title: Add snippet
user.description: Choose which content provider to add to this user's briefing.

provider_config.title: Configure snippet source
provider_config.description: Configure the source and scope for this snippet instance.

data_description.source_ref: Choose the entity or integration reference this snippet should read from.
data_description.summary_limit: Maximum number of items to summarize when this provider supports limiting results.

common.title: Snippet behavior
common.description: Choose how this snippet behaves in the briefing.

data_description.enabled: Disable this snippet without removing its saved configuration.
data_description.order: Lower numbers appear earlier in the rendered briefing.
data_description.priority: Mark snippets as required or optional for future rendering rules.
data_description.title_override: Optional custom title shown instead of the provider's default name.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure snippet
reconfigure.description: Update the source or behavior for this snippet instance.

data_description.source_ref: Choose the entity or integration reference this snippet should read from.
data_description.summary_limit: Maximum number of items to summarize when this provider supports limiting results.
data_description.enabled: Disable this snippet without removing its saved configuration.
data_description.order: Lower numbers appear earlier in the rendered briefing.
data_description.priority: Mark snippets as required or optional for future rendering rules.
data_description.title_override: Optional custom title shown instead of the provider's default name.

abort.provider_singleton: This snippet type can only be added once for a user profile.
abort.duplicate_source: A snippet with the same provider and source is already configured.

unknown_config_entry_id.message: The provided config_entry_id does not match any loaded User Briefing profile. Use the config entry selector to choose a valid profile.
